summary: Iteration 3 regression after Context useMemo/useCallback refactor (AuthContext, CartContext, ThemeContext, LanguageContext). Backend untouched and smoke-confirmed. All four context-consumer flows verified end-to-end with zero React pageerrors during navigation. The useMemo/useCallback refactor did not break any consumer; auth persistence, cart updates, theme class toggle, language menu, and logout all work as expected.
passed: Backend smoke: POST /api/auth/login farmer@kisanbaazar.in/farmer123 -> 200 with token (len 145)
AuthContext: buyer login -> /dashboard/buyer redirect succeeds; header shows 'Anita Sharma'
ThemeContext (useMemo+useCallback toggle): clicking [data-testid=theme-toggle] flips document.documentElement.classList 'dark' (false -> true)
LanguageContext (useMemo+useCallback): clicking [data-testid=lang-toggle] opens menu with English/Hindi/Marathi/Gujarati/Punjabi/Tamil/Telugu/Kannada/Malayalam options (screenshot evidence)
CartContext (useMemo+useCallback add): clicking [data-testid=add-cart-<id>] on /products updates header cart badge from empty to '1' (screenshot evidence)

Logout flow: [data-testid=user-menu-btn] -> [data-testid=menu-logout] clears auth token, redirects to /login, shows 'Welcome back, Anita Sharma!' toast (validates new try/catch logout error handling — no thrown error, clean redirect)
Zero pageerror events captured during full multi-page navigation (login -> dashboard -> products -> logout)
notes: Did not re-run full backend suite (orders, AI streaming, price-predict) since iteration_2 confirmed 16/16 and this iteration had NO backend changes. Razorpay payment remains MOCKED. Context refactor verified safe — auth/cart/theme/language consumers all re-render correctly.
